title: Update some dependencies, add CNI
body: This patch updates some of our dependencies, and adds CNI (which `vndr` will smartly drop if we run it again, but which we'll actually start using soon).

comments.body: LGTM and happy green test buttons.

:pushpin: Commit cdf9a53 has been approved by `rhatdan`
